description: Travel search and booking — air, hotel, car. Read operations cover search and trip retrieval; write operations (booking, cancellation) are gated. First implementers: sabre-blade-mcp, amadeus-blade-mcp.

operations.description: Search for available flights given origin, destination, dates, passenger count, and cabin class
operations.name: air_search

operations.description: Retrieve a previously booked trip / itinerary by reference (PNR, booking id)
operations.name: trip_get

operations.description: Search for available hotel rooms given location, dates, and guest count
operations.name: hotel_search

operations.description: Search for available rental cars given pickup / dropoff location and dates
operations.name: car_search

operations.description: List trips / itineraries booked under the account
operations.name: trip_list

operations.description: Retrieve fare rules and fare components for an offered air itinerary (refundability, change fees)
operations.name: fare_rules

operations.description: Retrieve seat map / availability for a given air segment
operations.name: seat_map

operations.description: Confirm a booking (air, hotel, or car) — issues tickets / vouchers and charges payment
operations.name: booking

operations.description: Cancel a confirmed booking — may incur fees per fare rules
operations.name: trip_cancel

title: travel-v1
